metadata.description: On Overleaf, create a new project and write a LaTeX booktabs table with 5 models x 4 metrics + Average + Delta row. The project must compile without errors and display the formatted table.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: On Overleaf, create a new project and write a LaTeX booktabs table with 5 models x 4 metrics + Average + Delta row. The project must compile without errors and display the formatted table.
